name: Lobster Matt - Turf & Surf Wars 2
description:
Uh oh! Matt for how clumsy he is pierced open oil, Which causes it to dislodge and leak! Turning him into a scary lobster monster..- Somethin’. He then spots you do you do?!

————————————

I guess im back, Happy late bday to me!! :D I might update this later to add some details!! (Apologies if there’s any mistakes ^^)

Requested by: @Ratinmyfood

(Tysm for the request!!)

Anywho, In short, Matt turned into some lobster creature thing and he spotted you!! Enjoy my lovelies!!
